title: Slow Roasted Australian Buckwheat
description: A hearty and flavorful dish that showcases the rich taste of Australian buckwheat. This slow roasted recipe brings out the nutty flavor of the buckwheat, perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Toss buckwheat groats with olive oil, onion, carrot, celery, Australian herb mix, salt, and pepper in a bowl until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with foil.
Roast in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
Remove foil and continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the buckwheat is tender and lightly browned.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Australian herb mix if desired.
